title: Letterkenny, Donegal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Letterkenny, Donegal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Letterkenny is a city in Donegal with a population of 20,000. The largest town in County Donegal, a regional hub for the northwest with a vibrant cultural scene, the Glenveagh National Park, and stunning Atlantic coastline.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
